headline: Taiwan Passes Crypto Rules Amid $2T Market Volatility

headline: Anthropic Revives Fable 5 Amid $10M Export Boost

headline: Oil Surplus Looms Amid 10% Stockpile Rebuild

article.summary: The global oil market is set to swing back into oversupply as the impact of the Iran war fades and traffic through the Strait of Hormuz recovers, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.

headline: Primark Sales Plummet 5% Ahead of AB Foods Split

article.title: Primark’s Sales Fall Before Fashion Chain’s Split from AB Foods
article.summary: Associated British Foods Plc reported falling sales at its Primark budget fashion chain, as the conglomerate prepares to separate its clothing and food divisions.
